name: Cmk Wisconsin
description_short: Cmk Wisconsin is a cash advance and loan services provider located on Lincoln Avenue in Milwaukee, offering quick access to emergency funds.
description_long: Cmk Wisconsin operates as a cash advance and loan services company in Milwaukee's Lincoln Avenue corridor, serving the west side community. The business is positioned within the broader emergency lending market, competing alongside other payday and title loan providers in the Milwaukee area. Based on available information, the company offers cash advance and loan services typical of this sector, designed for consumers facing immediate financial needs. The company has generated substantial local foot traffic with 310 recorded visits on directory listings, suggesting regular customer activity. However, limited public information is available about specific loan products, terms, APR rates, or eligibility requirements. The business maintains modest operating hours, closed on Sundays and Mondays, with extended Friday hours until 7 PM and Saturday morning availability. Current customer reviews are absent from the directory platform, making it difficult to assess service quality or customer satisfaction levels. As with most emergency lending providers, consumers should carefully review all loan terms, fees, and repayment obligations before borrowing, as these products typically carry high interest rates and short repayment periods.
pros: Convenient West Milwaukee location at 1311 W Lincoln Ave accessible to residents in the area
Extended operating hours including Friday evening (until 7 PM) and Saturday morning service
Strong local presence with 310 recorded directory visits indicating regular customer base
Direct phone contact available at 414-645-9580 for customer inquiries and applications
Same-category positioning with established competitors suggests operational stability
cons: No online presence or functional website listed, requiring in-person visits for services
Zero customer reviews available on directory platform, unable to assess service quality
No publicly disclosed information about APR rates, loan amounts, or specific terms
Limited operating hours with complete closure on Sundays and Mondays
No email contact option or alternative communication methods beyond phone listed
best_for: Milwaukee residents needing same-day or next-day emergency cash without credit checks
Individuals with poor credit seeking quick access to funds despite limited lending options
Consumers willing to visit physical locations and pay higher rates for immediate liquidity
diagnosis: Cmk Wisconsin is a local emergency cash provider best suited for Milwaukee residents needing immediate funds and willing to visit a physical location. Critical caveat: The complete absence of online information, customer reviews, or disclosed terms makes this a high-risk choice; consumers should verify current licensing, obtain written terms before signing, and confirm current operating hours before visiting.
